title: Infinite Toy Balls for F/A
description: Allows you to place infinite entities from one toy ball in Fossils and Archeology: Revival. This is a bug brought back from the 9.0.0.4/9.0.0.3 versions of the mod!
body:
# Infinite Toy Balls for F/A
**This addon allows you to place infinite toy balls from just one!** **This is a bug brought    back from the 9.0.0.3/9.0.0.4 versions of this mod.**

**You might be asking yourself, "why would I want this addon?" or "why did you make an addon that literally brings back a bug?"**     
-**The answer is simple. This mod was a request by my friend Cappe! He really liked that bug. However, anyone can benefit from not having to grind for toy balls!**     
The dependencies are:

<details>
<summary>Dependencies</summary>

Fossils and Archeology Revival    
Terrablender    
Architectury API    
Geckolib    
More Hitboxes      

</details>


# IMPORTANT NOTES!!!

**Note #1: I do NOT suggest using this in a server. It can be abused to lag out the server easily.**    
**Note #2: If you have any issues with this addon come to  ME and only ME, don't annoy the F/A devs with issues with my addon**
